creator: james-hunsaker@uiowa.edu
text:
Tried using the 3.3 RC floppies and it booted the first time fine, however I
had to quit the install.  When I tried booting using the same identical
floppies an hour later, the old behavior came back.  It still freezes after
displaying

npx0 on motherboard
npx0: INT 16 interface

I configured the kernel EXACTLY the same way I did before when it worked.
Also, I notice that before the install program comes up, it reports that
RTC? memory doesn't match up with bios memory so using bios instead.  It
reports this twice, but I can't get the exact error because it goes so fast.
